name: Knights Turkey Jerky 1
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients together in a marinade dish.
2. Add strips of turkey or beef into the marinade, coating them evenly.
3. Marinate for 8-24 hours, shaking the mixture occasionally and adjusting the flavor to your preference.
4. Remove the strips from the marinade and lightly pat dry with a towel to remove excess liquid.
5. Place the strips in a dehydrator or on sheets for an oven. Dehydrate until the jerky is tough/crisp. The time required varies based on dehydration method, using judgment (12-36 hours).
6. For extra spice, add additional Tabasco sauce as desired.
